events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter George Michael, born in London, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday.

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. What's your favourite track from the Wham! man?

events.title: 17th Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: The world remembers Michael Jackson, who passed away on this day in 2009 at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: 17 years since we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and influence continue to reign supreme. What's the one song that always gets you moving?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! The man behind the beat for so many iconic tracks. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May! An absolute icon of rock and a true star.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: 45th Anniversary of MTV Launch
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first video played.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed the game forever, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is still golden!

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's been 32 years since Oasis dropped their debut masterpiece 'Definitely Maybe'. A Britpop essential that still sounds massive. What's your album highlight?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, took place in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, the Woodstock Festival kicked off – three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Imagine being there!

events.title: 49th Anniversary of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: We mark 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since Elvis Presley left us. His music and charisma remain unmatched. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, The Beatles dropped 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks – pure genius. Which song is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that still commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Britpop legend and former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite track he's sung?

events.title: 25th Anniversary of First iPod Release
events.blurb: Apple released the original iPod in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago today, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing music consumption forever. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to rewatch your favourite 007 flick or blast some iconic Bond themes. What's your pick for the best Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Music icon John Lennon, a founding member of The Beatles, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have turned 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's his most impactful song for you?
